page-title.purpose: The H1 in PageHeader; one per page.

panel-title.purpose: Card heading; appears in every panel.

body.purpose: Default reading copy inside panels — light weight is the system's voice.

label-mono.purpose: Machine-readable labels: shortcuts, timestamps, ticker symbols. Reserved.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Default panels and stats. Paper-on-paper warm shadow.

shadows.name: pop
shadows.purpose: Popovers and elevated edit-mode chrome. At most once per viewport.

shadows.name: card-dark-mode
shadows.purpose: Dark-mode replacement; warm tint loses contrast on dark surfaces.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions; exponential pull-out, no bounce.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Sidebar slide, panel reveal, edit-mode chrome.

components.name: Panel (Card)
components.description: The workhorse. Every widget renders inside one.
components.html:
Tasks (mock — upstream blocked)

Body content
View all →
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #fff; border-radius: 18px; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid rgba(120,88,60,0.08); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(80,50,20,0.04), 0 4px 14px rgba(80,50,20,0.06); display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden; font-family: -apple-system, Inter, sans-serif; color: #2b2419; } .ds-panel-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 14px; } .ds-panel-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-panel-hint { font-size: 10px; color: #9a8a72; font-weight: 400; margin-left: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-panel-action { margin-left: auto; font-size: 12.5px; color: #6b5c48; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-weight: 500; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; font-family: inherit; } .ds-panel-action:hover { background: rgba(120,88,60,0.06); color: #2b2419; } .ds-panel-body { flex: 1; min-height: 0; } .ds-panel-foot { margin-top: auto; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(120,88,60,0.14); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 12.5px; color: #6b5c48; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 500; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-panel-foot:hover { color: #2b2419; } .ds-arr { opacity: 0.6; }

components.description: Single number with label + optional progress bar.

components.css: .ds-stat { background: #fff; border-radius: 18px; padding: 22px; border: 1px solid rgba(120,88,60,0.08); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(80,50,20,0.04), 0 4px 14px rgba(80,50,20,0.06); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; min-width: 0; font-family: -apple-system, Inter, sans-serif; color: #2b2419; } .ds-stat-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; color: #6b5c48; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-stat-icon { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 10px; background: #f4ede1; display: grid; place-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 12px; color: #6b5c48; } .ds-stat-icon.ds-accent { background: #f6e3d8; color: #d97757; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; } .ds-stat-sub { font-size: 12px; color: #9a8a72; } .ds-stat-bar { height: 4px; background: #f4ede1; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-stat-bar-fill { height: 100%; background: #d97757; border-radius: 999px; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" aria-label="Toggle edit mode"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 20h9"/><path d="M16.5 3.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4 12.5-12.5z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 999px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(120,88,60,0.14); color: #6b5c48; display: grid; place-items: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; font-family: inherit; } .ds-icon-btn:hover { background: #f4ede1; color: #2b2419; } .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d97757; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-icon-btn svg { opacity: 0.75; transition: opacity 150ms ease, stroke 150ms ease; } .ds-icon-btn:hover svg { opacity: 1; } .ds-icon-btn.ds-active { background: #f6e3d8; border-color: #d97757; } .ds-icon-btn.ds-active svg { stroke: #d97757; opacity: 1; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Topbar search with inline icon and ⌘K hint.
components.html: ⌘K
components.css: .ds-search { position: relative; max-width: 360px; font-family: -apple-system, Inter, sans-serif; } .ds-search input { width: 100%; padding: 9px 12px 9px 38px; border: 1px solid rgba(120,88,60,0.14); border-radius: 999px; background: #fff; font: inherit; font-size: 13px; color: #2b2419; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-search input:focus { border-color: #d97757; } .ds-search input::placeholder { color: #9a8a72; } .ds-search-ico { position: absolute; left: 13px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); opacity: 0.45; color: #6b5c48; pointer-events: none; } .ds-search-kbd { position: absolute; right: 10px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); font-family: "SF Mono", monospace; font-size: 10.5px; color: #9a8a72; background: #f4ede1; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 5px; }

components.name: Sidebar Item
components.description: Walnut-rail nav row. Active state = walnut-active backplate, no peach.
components.css: .ds-sb { background: #2a231d; padding: 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; font-family: -apple-system, Inter, sans-serif; border-radius: 18px; min-width: 200px; } .ds-sb-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 14px; color: rgba(241,230,212,0.55); font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; border: none; background: transparent; text-align: left; width: 100%; font-family: inherit; } .ds-sb-item:hover { color: #f1e6d4; background: rgba(241,230,212,0.05); } .ds-sb-item.ds-active { background: #3d342c; color: #f1e6d4; font-weight: 500; } .ds-sb-ico { font-size: 8px; opacity: 0.6; }

narrative.overview:
Setsushin is a single-owner personal command surface that should feel like a small library: warm paper underfoot, a walnut binding running down one edge, a single peach bookmark left between pages. The owner reads it daily. Nothing in the room is loud. Everything in the room is cared for.

Density is welcome — this is the bridge of a working ship, not a meditation app — but density is earned through typographic discipline, hairline borders, and tight scale ratios, not by stuffing the page. When the dashboard is at rest, it is at rest. Motion is the exception, never the ambient state. Color is one accent and the paper; everything else is ink at varying strengths.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream + walnut + a single peach mark (one accent, ≤10% of any view)
Hierarchy carried by typography (weight × scale × serif-vs-mono), not whitespace
Hairline borders, paper-soft shadows, no decorative gradients
Authored: serif headlines, mono labels, asymmetric stat strips are fair game
Stillness at rest; motion only as response to user input

rules.name: The One Mark Rule
rules.body: The peach accent is used on ≤10% of any rendered surface. It marks the user's place — never decoration.

rules.name: The No-Black Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden. Every neutral is tinted toward warm-brown.

rules.name: The No-Decorative-Gradient Rule
rules.body: Decorative gradients are forbidden on backgrounds, hero areas, and text. Existing gradients (brand mark, avatar) are scheduled for replacement.

rules.name: The Light-Weight-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Body copy is font-weight 300. Hierarchy gains weight against this baseline.

rules.name: The Mono-As-Caption Rule
rules.body: Mono is reserved for machine-readable labels. Its appearance is semantic.

rules.name: The Tracking-Tightens-As-Size-Grows Rule
rules.body: Display ≥28px tightens to -0.02em; mid sizes -0.01em; body 0; mono +0.02em.

rules.name: The Paper-Not-Glass Rule
rules.body: Shadows simulate paper-on-paper: short, warm, soft. Cap blur at 28px, alpha at 0.18.

rules.name: The Borders-Do-the-Work Rule
rules.body: Hairline borders carry depth. Shadows quietly reinforce.

dos: Do keep the cream → walnut → peach trio; tone variants are personalization, not identity replacement.
Do carry hierarchy through type weight × scale × serif/mono contrast, ≥1.25:1 ratio between adjacent steps.
Do use font-weight 300 for body — the light voice is the system.
Do use mono exclusively for machine labels (shortcuts, timestamps, tickers).
Do prefer hairline borders over heavy shadows.
Do keep state changes under 200ms with exponential ease-out.
Do prefer inline editing over modals.
Do validate WCAG AA contrast on every tone × mode pair when changing neutrals.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff as text or surface color.
Don't introduce decorative gradients; replace with flat color + precise type.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter blur on translucent cards).
Don't add side-stripe borders > 1px as colored accents.
Don't ship the hero-metric template (big number + small label + supporting stats + gradient).
Don't ship a uniform card grid; variety lives in arrangement.
Don't reach for a modal first — exhaust inline alternatives.
Don't use neon or iris cool hues for status; status sits in the warm family.
Don't drift into Linear/Vercel cool-grey + iris.
